title: Fix RPL rank and counter semantics
description: Resolve review findings in the recovered RPL hardening: compare DAGRank rather than raw Rank for parent admissibility; treat MaxRankIncrease=0 as disabled; reject ranks below ROOT_RANK; support RFC circular-counter wrap 127->0 for DIO/DAO comparison and generation; reject local RPLInstanceID encodings with the embedded D bit set.
acceptance_criteria: RFC-derived literal boundary tests cover DAGRank equality, MaxRankIncrease zero, sub-root rank rejection, 127->0 comparison and DAO generation, and invalid 0xC0..0xFF local instance values in parse/write paths; RPL tests and Clippy pass; three reviews pass.
close_reason: Implemented RFC-derived fixes with literal regression tests; combined gates pass 99 lichen-rpl tests, 143 lichen-node std tests, RPL all-feature Clippy, formatting, and repeated independent review cycles.
